name: Value Grupo Financiero, S.A.B. de C.V.
summary: Value Grupo Financiero, S.A.B. de C.V. provides various financial services. It provides stock exchange, credit, operational and financial leasing, and factoring services. The company was formerly known as Grupo Financiero Fina Value SA de CV and changed its name to Value Grupo Financiero, S.A.B. de C.V. in May 2000. Value Grupo Financiero, S.A.B. de C.V. was founded in 1992 and is based in San Pedro Garza Garc√É¬≠a, Mexico.
